skills.name: web-scraper
skills.description: Extract structured data from a URL using CSS selectors. Returns JSON.
skills.author: OnePagent Team

skill.name: web-scraper
skill.description: Scrape structured data from any URL
skill.body:
# Web Scraper

When the user wants to extract data from a webpage, call `scrape_page` with the URL and a dictionary of CSS selectors. The tool returns matched text for each key.

## Example
- User: "Get the title and price from https://example.com/item"
- Call: scrape_page({ url: '...', selectors: { title: 'h1', price: '.price' } })

tools.name: scrape_page
tools.description: Fetch a URL and extract text via CSS selectors
tools.handler: const r = await fetch(input.url); const html = await r.text(); const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(html, 'text/html'); const out = {}; for (const k in input.selectors) { const el = doc.querySelector(input.selectors[k]); out[k] = el ? el.textContent.trim() : null; } return JSON.stringify(out);
